blocks.text: Perform at: Southern Hills Hospital & Medical Center
Procedure Description: Right total shoulder arthroplasty
23430: tenodesis of long tendon of biceps
23472: arthroplasty, glenohumeral joint; total shoulder (glenoid and proximal humeral replacement (eg, total shoulder))
23333: removal of foreign body, shoulder; deep (subfascial or intramuscular)
Ancef - 1 gram TXA at incision and another gram during closure
HPI: This is a 74 year old male who:
is being seen for a chief complaint of Right shoulder. Edward presents today for right
shoulder pre op. He did not complete his CT scan. He is scheduled for a right total
shoulder arthroplasty on 04/07/26 at Southern Hills Hospital. His pain is a 8 out of 10.
Right upper extremity exam notable for the
Active forward flexion to 90 degrees. Crepitus
with range of motion. 4 out of 5 rotator cuff
strength testing. Positive Hawkins, Neer, and
empty can test. Distally neurovascularly intact.
Patient Specific Notes: Ed presents today for preoperative visit. He is scheduled for a right
reverse total shoulder on April 7th at Southern Hills Hospital. All questions regarding
surgery were answered. He was provided with a sling and post operative pain medication.
We will use his regular anti-coagulants for post op DVT prophylaxis. He will follow up 2
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
The right shoulder was braced with a ultrasling, Shoulder orthosis, abduction.
I recommend continued use of the orthosis until next follow up.
Initiate Treatment: Initiate treatment with prescription medication.
Based on Risk Selected: Low Risk (0-3 points)
Sig: Take 1 tab p.o. every 6 hours as needed pain
Quantity: 28 Tablet Earliest fill date: March 20, 2026
Follow up for: Further Evaluation and Management - 5 minutes. Other
Electronically Signed By: Lawrence R Huff, MD, 03/20/2026 11:11 AM PDT
I saw the patient with Rhianna McGowan, elicited a history, performed an exam, and developed an impression and
plan. I was present for all key aspects of the visit. My impression is as follows:
Shoulder Arthritis, Right: located on the right shoulder.
Plan: Additional Notes, Counseling - Preoperative Instructions, Brace - Shoulder, Prescription Medication Management,
Electronically Signed By: Rhianna I McGowan, PA-C, 03/20/2026 06:49 AM PDT
5670 W Flamingo Rd, Ste D, Las Vegas NV 89103
Primary Needs for Home Health (check all that apply):
When we call, we will also need to obtain the following information before seeing the
patient. If you have these available, feel free to fax along with this form.
Recent H&P or recent progress notes
